debug_info.goal:
R : Type ?u.16996
inst✝ : CommRing R
I J : Ideal R
⊢ ∀ (c : R) {x : R}, x ∈ ↑I ∩ ↑J → c • x ∈ ↑I ∩ ↑J

failed_attempts:
intro c x hx
    constructor <;>
      (try aesop) <;>
      (try simp_all [Ideal.mem_inter, Ideal.smul_mem_left]) <;>
      (try {
        have h₁ : c • x ∈ I := Ideal.smul_mem_left c hx.1
        have h₂ : c • x ∈ J := Ideal.smul_mem_left c hx.2
        exact ⟨h₁, h₂⟩
      })
    <;>
      (try aesop)

intro c x hx
    exact ⟨hx.1.smul_of_mem c, hx.2.smul_of_mem c⟩

intro r x ⟨hx, hy⟩

    (try simp_all [Ideal.smul_mem_left]) <;>
    (try simp_all [Ideal.smul_mem_right]) <;>

    constructor
    · -- Prove that c • x ∈ I
      exact Ideal.smul_mem I c h₁
    · -- Prove that c • x ∈ J
      exact Ideal.smul_mem J c h₂

    · -- Prove that c • x ∈ J

    have h₄ : c • x ∈ J := by

    have h_Jc : c • x ∈ J := J.smul_mem h_J

intro x hx y hy
    -- Show that if x and y are in the intersection of I and J, then x + y is also in the intersection.
    have hI : x ∈ I := hx.1
    have hJ : x ∈ J := hx.2
    have hI' : y ∈ I := hy.1
    have hJ' : y ∈ J := hy.2
    -- Since I and J are ideals, they are closed under addition.
    have hI'' : x + y ∈ I := I.add_mem hI hI'
    have hJ'' : x + y ∈ J := J.add_mem hJ hJ'
    -- Therefore, x + y is in the intersection of I and J.
    exact ⟨hI'', hJ''⟩
  
  zero_mem' := by
    -- Show that 0 is in the intersection of I and J.
    have hI : (0 : R) ∈ I := I.zero_mem
    have hJ : (0 : R) ∈ J := J.zero_mem
    -- Since 0 is in both I and J, it is in their intersection.
    exact ⟨hI, hJ⟩
  
  smul_mem' := by
    intro c x hx
    -- Extract the membership in I and J from hx.
    have hI : x ∈ I := hx.1
    have hJ : x ∈ J := hx.2
    -- Use the fact that I and J are ideals to show that c • x is in both I and J.
    have hI' : c • x ∈ I := I.smul_mem _ hI
    have hJ' : c • x ∈ J := J.smul_mem _ hJ
    -- Combine the results to show that c • x is in the intersection of I and J.
    exact ⟨hI', hJ'⟩

    have h₄ : c • x ∈ J := J.smul_mem _ h₂
    exact ⟨h₃, h₄⟩
